---
title: "Markov Random Field models for continuous sequential data"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: mathjax
bibliography: references.bib
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Vignette's Title}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---



## Setup

To follow this vignette, you'll need the following packages

```{r}
#| label: pkg-list
pkgs <- c( "mgcv", "MRFtools", "Matrix", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "gratia")
```

Running this will load all these packages into your workspace.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| cache: false
#| message: false
vapply(
  pkgs,
  library,
  logical(1),
  character.only = TRUE,
  logical.return = TRUE
)
```

Here we will
